zh.Ingham,Norfolk,England: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可英厄姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Miles Stapleton III於大約1353年出生在英國越可爾貝達爾時，他的父親Sir Miles Stapleton II39歲，母親Joan Ingham41歲。他於大約1375年與Ela Ufford在英國越可爾貝達爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1419年4月10日在他的家鄉享年67歲。

zh-hans.Ingham,Norfolk,England: 英国英格兰諾福爾可英厄姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Miles Stapleton III于大约1353年出生在英国越可爾貝達爾时，他的父亲Sir Miles Stapleton II39岁，母亲Joan Ingham41岁。他于大约1375年与Ela Ufford在英国越可爾貝達爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1419年4月10日在他的家乡享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stapleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Stapleton (in Devon, Gloucestershire, Somerset, Herefordshire, Shropshire, Leicestershire, North Yorkshire, Yorkshire, Cumberland), all named in Old English with stapol ‘post, pillar’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The name is common in Ireland, where it has been established since medieval times in the counties of Tipperary and Kilkenny.

nameMeanings.name: Miles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman origin but uncertain derivation. Unlike most Norman names it is, as far as can be ascertained, not derived from any known Old French or Germanic name element. It may be a greatly altered pet form of Michael , which came to be associated with the Latin word miles ‘soldier’ because of the military attributes of the archangel Michael. However, the usual Latin form of the name in the Middle Ages was Milo. There is a common Slavic name element mil ‘grace, favour’, with which it may possibly have some connection. The name has been in regular use in England since the 16th century. See also Milo and Myles .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Miles Stapleton III was born about 1353, in Bedale, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Miles Stapleton II, was 39 and his mother, Joan Ingham, was 41. He married Ela Ufford about 1375, in Bedale, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 10 April 1419, in his hometown, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Miles Stapleton III est né environ 1353, à Bedale, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Miles Stapleton II, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Joan Ingham, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Ela Ufford environ 1375, à Bedale, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 10 avril 1419, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Miles Stapleton III um 1353 in Bedale, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Miles Stapleton II 39 und seine Mutter Joan Ingham 41. Er hat um 1375 in Bedale, Yorkshire, England Ela Ufford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 10. April 1419 im Alter von 67 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Miles Stapleton III è nato il circa 1353 nel Bedale, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Miles Stapleton II, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Joan Ingham, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Ela Ufford circa 1375, nel Bedale, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 10 aprile 1419, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Miles Stapleton IIIが約1353年にイギリスヨークシュアイアベダルで生まれた時，父Sir Miles Stapleton IIは39歳，母Joan Inghamは41歳であった。約1375年にイギリスヨークシュアイアベダルでEla Uffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1419年4月10日に故郷で67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Miles Stapleton III(이)가 대략 1353년 영국 요르크실르 베데일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Miles Stapleton II(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Ingham(은)는 41세였다. 그는 대략 1375년 영국 요르크실르 베데일에서 Ela Ufford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1419년 4월 10일 그의 고향에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Ingham,Norfolk,England: Ingham, Norðfolc, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Miles Stapleton III nasceu aproximadamente 1353, em Bedale, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Miles Stapleton II, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Joan Ingham, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Ela Ufford aproximadamente 1375, em Bedale, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 10 de abril de 1419, em sua cidade natal, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Miles Stapleton III родился около 1353 г. в местности бедеил, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Miles Stapleton II было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Ingham, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Ela Ufford около 1375 г. в местности бедеил, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 10 апреля 1419 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Miles Stapleton III nació aproximadamente 1353, en Bedale, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Miles Stapleton II, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Joan Ingham, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Ela Ufford aproximadamente 1375, en Bedale, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 10 de abril de 1419, en su pueblo, a la edad de 67 años.
